scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:haas_serial && pnpm run build:image_processor && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:status
scripts.publish:haas_serial: pnpm run build:haas_serial && docker push bkmachine/haas-serial
scripts.publish:image_processor: pnpm run build:image_processor && docker push bkmachine/image-processor
scripts.publish:server: pnpm run build:server && docker push bkmachine/shop-app
scripts.publish:status: pnpm run build:status && docker push bkmachine/cnc-status
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run publish:haas_serial && pnpm run publish:image_processor && pnpm run publish:server && pnpm run publish:status
